name: Broken Schema Fix
title: Fix Mismatched Pydantic Schema
description: Given a broken FastAPI endpoint where the response model has a field 'user_name' but the SQLAlchemy model has 'username', diagnose the validation error and fix the schema mismatch. Write tests to verify.

name: Missing DB Connection Pool
title: Fix Missing Connection Pool Configuration
description: Given a FastAPI app with raw SQLite connections (not pooled), refactor it to use SQLAlchemy connection pooling. Fix the 'too many open files' error under concurrent load. Add pool_size=10, max_overflow=20.

name: Async Event Loop Error
title: Fix RuntimeError: Event Loop Already Running
description: Given code that calls asyncio.run() inside an async context, fix the RuntimeError: 'This event loop is already running.' Refactor to use asyncio.create_task() or await directly.

name: N+1 Query Repair
title: Fix N+1 Database Query Problem
description: Given a FastAPI endpoint that loads a list of orders and then iterates to fetch each user separately (N+1), fix it using SQLAlchemy joinedload or selectinload to batch the user fetches into a single query.

name: Circular Import Fix
title: Resolve Python Circular Import Error
description: Given a FastAPI project with circular imports between models.py and schemas.py, fix the ImportError. Refactor using TYPE_CHECKING guards, late imports, or module restructuring.

name: Broken Alembic Migration
title: Fix Broken Alembic Migration
description: Given a failed Alembic migration that errors with 'column already exists', write a repair migration that checks for the column's existence before adding it. Add proper rollback logic in the downgrade function.

name: Memory Leak Fix
title: Fix Memory Leak in Background Task
description: Given a FastAPI background task that accumulates results in a global dictionary and never cleans up, diagnose the memory leak and fix it. Add TTL-based eviction and bounded cache size using LRU.

name: Race Condition Fix
title: Fix Race Condition in Async Counter
description: Given an async Python endpoint that increments a shared counter without locking (race condition under load), fix it using asyncio.Lock() or atomic Redis INCR. Write a concurrent test to verify correctness.

name: Broken Requirements Fix
title: Fix Incompatible requirements.txt
description: Given a requirements.txt with conflicting version pins (e.g., pydantic==1.9 and fastapi==0.100 which requires pydantic>=2.0), resolve the conflicts. Upgrade or downgrade packages to a mutually compatible set.

name: Missing Await Fix
title: Fix Missing Await in Async Function
description: Given a FastAPI endpoint that calls async database functions without await (returning coroutine objects instead of results), identify all missing awaits and fix them. Add type annotations to prevent recurrence.

name: CORS Preflight Failure
title: Fix CORS Preflight Request Failures
description: Given a FastAPI API receiving CORS preflight errors from a frontend on a different port, diagnose and fix the CORS configuration. Handle credentials, allowed methods, and exposed headers correctly.

name: Broken Pagination Fix
title: Fix Off-By-One Error in Pagination
description: Given a pagination implementation that returns n+1 items on the last page or skips the first item on subsequent pages, identify and fix the off-by-one error. Write parameterized tests for all edge cases.

name: Deadlock Resolution
title: Resolve Database Deadlock
description: Given a PostgreSQL scenario with two transactions that deadlock when updating rows in opposite order, refactor the code to acquire locks in a consistent order. Add error handling for deadlock retry.
